subject: Add model_training/model_serving/results sub-constants to PATHS.py
description: In Z:/_dev-ssd/thesis-manifold/PATHS.py, add: THESIS_MODELLING_TRAINING_DIR (THESIS_MODELLING_DIR / "model_training"), THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_DIR (THESIS_MODELLING_DIR / "model_serving"), THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_SYSTEM_A_DIR (THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_DIR / "system_a_forecast"), THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_SYSTEM_B_DIR (THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_DIR / "system_b_conversational"), THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ1_DIR (THESIS_RESULTS_DIR / "srq1"), THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ2_DIR (THESIS_RESULTS_DIR / "srq2"), THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ4_DIR (THESIS_RESULTS_DIR / "srq4"). Depends on task 1 (THESIS_MODELLING_DIR and THESIS_RESULTS_DIR must already point at new locations). Verify: python3 -c "from PATHS import THESIS_MODELLING_TRAINING_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_SYSTEM_A_DIR, THESIS_MODELLING_SERVING_SYSTEM_B_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ1_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ2_DIR, THESIS_RESULTS_SRQ4_DIR; print('OK')". Use the safe temp-script edit pattern, never Edit/Write directly on .py files per project hook rule.
